p2p_enrich.notes: Added 4 p2p tests from Electron repo CI. CI commands discovered: (1) clang-format --dry-run --Werror (from lint:clang-format npm script / pipeline-electron-lint.yml), (2) python3 script/run-clang-format.py (repo's own format wrapper used in CI). Node.js-based CI commands (eslint, tsc, lint.js) skipped - Node.js not in container. GN check/build/test skipped - requires full Chromium checkout. clang-tidy skipped - no compilation database. Tests added: test_repo_clang_format_target, test_repo_clang_format_script, test_repo_target_file_exists, test_repo_valid_encoding. All 4 p2p tests pass on base commit. Also fixed test.sh to handle working directory and exit code correctly.

validate.notes: All four checks passed on first attempt. Docker build: cached, succeeded. NOP test: reward=0 (7 f2p tests correctly fail on base commit, 5 p2p tests pass). Gold test: reward=1 (all 12 tests pass after applying solve.sh patch). Rubric judge: 1.0 (empty rubric). No fixes needed.
